title: Vesmir: Weapons
description: The mod adds 18 legendary swords inspired by real-world legends. Each sword features unique abilities, from Excalibur’s power to Zulfiqar’s sharpness. Explore and trade to acquire these powerful weapons. Pick your swords, and begin your epic battles!
body:
# Overview
Vesmir: Weapons invites players to explore the rich tapestry of legendary lore through 18 iconic swords inspired by real-world myths. Each sword comes with its own unique abilities, allowing you to wield the power of legends like Excalibur, known for its royal might, and Zulfiqar, famed for its unparalleled sharpness.

Venture through the expansive Minecraft world to discover these legendary weapons, whether through exploration or trading with villagers. Each blade not only enhances your combat prowess but also connects you to the rich stories behind them. Imagine battling fierce mobs wielding the enchanted powers of Muramasa or summoning elemental forces with other legendary blades!

Choose your sword wisely, as each one offers a distinct playstyle and strategy, perfect for both solo adventures and multiplayer battles. Gather your friends, forge alliances, and embark on epic quests where your legendary weapons become the key to victory.

# Items
- Excalibur: The legendary sword of King Arthur, symbolizing rightful sovereignty and divine power.
  - Weather Control: Changes weather on will. [Shift + Righ Click]
  - The King: Gives a lot of power for a minute. [Right Click]
- Zulfiqar: A revered blade in Islamic tradition, known for its sharpness and association with bravery in battle.
  - Divine Judgement: Unleashes a powerful crescent-shaped energy wave that damages and knocks back enemies. [Shift+ Righ Click]
  - Shield of Faith: Grants the wielder and nearby allies resistance to negative status effects and magical attacks. [Righ Click]
  - Heavenly Endurance (Buff): Increases the wielder's stamina and grants resistance to physical damage.
- Muramasa: A cursed katana from Japanese folklore, infamous for its bloodlust and the tragic fate of its wielders.
  - Cursed Blades: Inflicts bleeding damage over time on enemies struck by the sword.
  - Bloodlust: Increases attack speed and strength for a short duration after defeating an enemy.
  - Muramasa's Frenzy: Enhances the wielder's damage output and health recovery with each consecutive hit.
- Harpe: A mythical sword from Greek mythology, often linked to divine retribution and heroism.
  - Serpent's Bite: Poisons enemies on hit, causing damage over time. (30% chance, when player health below 5, activates Serpent King's Bite)
  - Swift Strike: Allows the wielder to move swiftly for a short duration, evading attacks more easily. [Right Click]
  - Avenger's Vengeance: Increases damage dealt to enemies who have harmed the wielder recently.
- Joyeuse: The legendary sword of Charlemagne, representing valor and the spirit of chivalry in French history.
  - Royal Guard: Summons an Iron Golem to aid the wielder in battle. [Shift + Right Click]
  - Dazzling Strike: Emits a blinding light that stuns enemies in front of the wielder. [Right Click]
  - Noble Resilience: Grants temporary invulnerability and health regeneration upon taking fatal damage. (when player's health falls below 3)
- Thuan Thien: A Vietnamese sword of legend, celebrated for its connection to dragons and heroic feats.
  - Dragon's Roar: Releases a powerful shockwave that knocks back enemies and damages them. [Shift + Right Click]
  - Heavenly Grace: Grants temporary flight to the wielder, allowing them to soar above obstacles. [Right Click]
  - Celestial Blessing: Increases the wielder's luck and chance of finding rare items.
- Durandal: The famed sword of Roland, known for its invincibility and role in epic battles in French lore.
  - Fortress Guard: Creates an impenetrable barrier that absorbs all incoming attacks for a short time. [Right Click]
  - Sacred Strike: Releases a burst of holy energy that damages enemies around the wielder. [Shift + Right Click]
  - Knight's Valor: Enhances the wielder's defence.
- Grass Cutting Sword: A Japanese folklore blade said to control nature, embodying harmony between man and earth.
  - Nature's Fury: Summons a storm of razor-sharp leaves that slice through enemies in a cone. [Right Click]
  - Druid's Blessing: Increases the wielder's connection with nature, granting health regeneration and resistance, also grants speed and agility in natural environments when in a fight.
- Tizona and Colada: Legendary swords of Spanish lore, attributed to epic warriors and their conquests.
  - Fiery Wrath: Sets enemies ablaze with each strike, dealing fire damage over time.
  - Dual Strike: Summons Colada, increased attack damage when Colada is held in off-hand while holding Tizona in main-hand.
  - Conqueror's Spirit: Grants temporary invulnerability and increased damage after defeating a powerful enemy. (enemy with 60+ health)
- Joan of Arc's Sword: The historic blade of the French heroine, symbolizing faith and the fight for freedom.
  - Divine Inspiration: Inspires nearby allies, boosting their morale and increasing their combat effectiveness. [Right Click]
  - Martyr's Shield: Sacrifices the wielder's health to create a protective barrier around allies, absorbing damage. [Shift + Right Click]
  - Saint's Resolve: Grants the wielder enhanced healing and resistance.
- Shamshir-e Zomorrodnergar: A Persian legend sword associated with emeralds and the power to conquer foes.
  - Emerald Flash: Unleashes a barrage of green energy bolts that damage enemies in front of the wielder. [Right Click]
  - Sultan's Wisdom: Increases the wielder's agility and strength for a duration [Shift + Right Click]
  - Jade Harmony: Restores health to the wielder over time and grants resistance to all types of attacks.
- Asi: An Indian mythical sword linked to divine blessings and the balance of cosmic forces.
  - Divine Blessing: Heals nearby allies and boosts their attack and defense temporarily. [Right Click]
  - Cosmic Balance: Increases the wielder's harmony with the universe, boosting strength and charisma. [Shift + Right Click]
  - Karma Strike: Reflects a portion of damage taken back at the attacker.
- Gramr: A Norse sword known for its dragon-slaying prowess, embodying the strength of the gods.
  - Dragon Slayer: Deals extra damage to draconic creatures.
  - Dragon King: Summons a dragon ally temporarily. [Right Click]
  - Frostbite: Freezes enemies in place on critical hits, slowing their movement and attack speed. (20% chance)
  - Valhalla's Fury: Channels the strength of Norse gods, increasing attack power of the wielder. [Shift + Right Click]
- Kladenets: A Russian folklore sword said to channel thunder and protect its wielder with icy barriers.
  - Thunderous Echo: Sends out shockwaves that damage enemies even at a distance.
  - Frost Barrier: Covers the wielder in ice, reducing incoming damage. [Right Click]
  - Slavic Spirit: Enhances the wielder's endurance and grants resistance to magical attacks for a duration. [Shift + Right Click]
- Caladbolg: An Irish mythical sword known for its destructive power and connection to the Tuatha Dé Danann.
  - Stormbringer: Calls down a lightning bolt to strike enemies in a targeted area. [Right Click] (if player's health is below 6, it has no cooldown)
  - Wave of Annihilation: Unleashes a powerful wave of energy that damages all enemies in front of the wielder.
  - Tuatha Dé Danann's Blessing: Grants the wielder increased vitality and regeneration, bolstering their combat capabilities. [Shift + Right Click]
- Gan Jiang: A legendary Chinese sword representing mastery in craftsmanship and fiery wrath.
  - Forgemaster's Grace: Add random number of ores to player's inventory. [Shift + Right Click]
  - Dragon's Flame: Engulfs enemies in a cone of fire, dealing damage over time. [Right Click]
  - Unyielding Strike: Chance to disarm the opponent. (20% chance)
- Chandrahas: A Hindu sword associated with lunar power and the wrath of deities.
  - Moonlit Slash: Releases energy waves that cut through enemies.
  - Lunar Blessing: Grants the wielder increased agility and evasion under moonlight.
  - Shiva's Fury: Channels the power of the moon god, increasing attack speed and damage for a duration. [Right Click] (can only be activated at night time)
- Dáinsleif: A cursed Norse sword that drains life from foes, steeped in tales of vengeance and fate.
  - Cursed Blade: Drains the life force of enemies struck, healing the wielder.
  - Dreadful Curse: Places a curse on enemies, making them weaker for some time. (20% chance)
  - Berserker's Wrath: Increases damage output and resistance to crowd control effects during battle. [Right Click]
- Nandaka: A celestial sword from Hindu mythology, embodying divine light and the pursuit of justice.
  - Surya's Radiance: Emits a blinding light that damages enemies and temporarily blinds them. [Shift + Right Click]
  - Vajra Strike: Unleashes a powerful shockwave that stuns enemies in a radius. [Right Click]
  - Divine Favor: Increases the wielder's luck and chance of finding rare items.
